task_completion.description: Open the profile or edit screen for the target user.

task_completion.description: Ensure the user's name and roles remain unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the edit screen show the Name field containing 'Amani Al-Fayed' and the Roles field/checkboxes containing 'Doctor', 'Healer', and 'user' without being altered or removed.
Screenshots show the agent clicking a 'Save', 'Update', or 'Add' button on the user form, or a success notification/toast indicating the user profile was successfully updated.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the application UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine application.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to edit the database directly.
